category_sources: Official GitHub README describes it as a fast way to manage projects as tmux sessions.
source_facts.description says tmux-sessionizer opens git repositories as tmux sessions.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is tmux-sessionizer (tms).
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents installation and shell completions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jrmoulton/tmux-sessionizer; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository includes Rust project files and documents the tms CLI.
source_facts.description supports tmux, git, and session-management tags.
